parameters.text:
=You are generating an affiliate email for THIS product ONLY.

Product name:
{{$json.productName}}

Affiliate link:
{{$json.affiliateLink}}

STRICT RULES:
- Use ONLY the product and link above
- Do NOT invent products
- Do NOT replace the affiliate link
- If the link mentions back pain, write about back pain
- If the link is skincare, write about skincare
- Match the product category exactly

FORMAT EXACTLY LIKE THIS:

SUBJECT:
<one compelling subject line>

BODY:
<short persuasive body explaining what it helps with, who it's for, key benefits>

PRODUCT_NAME:
{{$json.productName}}

AFFILIATE_LINK:
{{$json.affiliateLink}}

imageUrl
{{ $json[' imageUrl'] }}

Do not explain.
Do not add anything else.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}
parameters.html:
=

{{ $json.subject }}

{{ $json.body }}

Product: {{ $json.productName }}

👉 Shop Now

If the button doesn’t work, copy & paste:
{{ $json.affiliateLink }}

If you no longer want these emails, unsubscribe here .
